The question is asking to determine the number of men who were repatriated along with Rasul Kudayev. Since each row represents an individual and the "notes" column contains information about repatriation dates and groups, we need to group by the repatriation information in the "notes" column to identify how many men were repatriated together. We can use the f_group_column(notes) operation to group the individuals based on their repatriation details to analyze this situation.

The notes column indicates that Rasul Kudayev was reported to have been repatriated on 24 February 2004 with six other Russian men. This means there were a total of 7 men repatriated together (Rasul Kudayev plus the six others).
